overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-slicked, neon-drenched futuristic city at night. The character navigates from wide commercial streets lined with holographic advertisements into narrow, atmospheric alleyways with Asian-inspired signage, eventually ascending an outdoor staircase to upper-level walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide commercial street with holographic advertisements

events.description: character passes pedestrians walking in opposite direction on the sidewalk
character turns slightly right to follow the curving street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, passing by a large colorful building with grid-patterned lights on the left

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera then passing by

entered.detail: tall building facade with large square panels glowing in rainbow colors (blue, green, yellow, red)
yellow and white striped construction barriers lining the right side of the walkway
large floating advertisement visible above the street in the distance
various illuminated signs including a prominent red vertical sign

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide, wet commercial street at night, passing a massive building covered in colorful grid-like lights on the left. The street is lined with construction barriers on the right, and a few pedestrians walk in the opposite direction. Neon signs and holographic advertisements illuminate the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow street with Asian-inspired red paper lanterns

events.description: enters a narrower street section with overhead building extensions and red paper lanterns
passes a parked white car on the right side of the narrow street

agents.ego_description: navigating through a narrower corridor with red lanterns overhead, passing parked vehicles

entered.detail: traditional Asian-style red paper lanterns hanging from building awnings
overhead walkway or building extension creating a covered corridor effect
white sedan parked along the right curb

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into a narrower, more enclosed street lined with traditional red paper lanterns. The character passes under building overhangs that partially cover the sky, and a parked car sits on the right. The colorful grid building from the previous section falls behind as the street takes on a more intimate, Asian-market atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed alley with food stalls and green neon lighting

events.description: lighting shifts from red to dominant green neon as character passes food stall with steam

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow alleyway passing by an illuminated food stall with steam rising

entered.detail: horizontal green neon light strips running along building facades
small outdoor food vendor with steam rising and warm interior lighting
illuminated vending machine with glowing display
yellow construction barrels and scattered debris on the ground

segments.scene_description: The character moves deeper into a narrow, enclosed alleyway dominated by green neon lighting. A food stall with steam rising from its counter appears on the left, while yellow construction barrels line the right side. The environment feels more intimate and gritty, with overhead walkways visible between the buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley corner with large advertisements and stair approach

events.description: passes large illuminated billboard and approaches corner with dumpster fire
character slows and turns toward outdoor metal staircase entrance

agents.ego_description: navigating past a large advertisement wall and approaching a stairway entrance marked by road barriers

entered.detail: large backlit billboard featuring 'NiCola' branding with a figure in a circular design
red and white striped barriers with 'ROAD CLOSED' text blocking the street ahead
green dumpster with an open lid next to a burning barrel providing warm orange light
metal outdoor staircase leading upward between buildings

segments.scene_description: The character passes a massive 'NiCola' advertisement on the left wall and navigates around road-closed barriers. A burning barrel next to a green dumpster provides warm lighting on the right. The path ahead leads to an outdoor metal staircase ascending between the buildings, marking a transition point in the environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor stairwell and upper level walkways

events.description: begins ascending the metal outdoor staircase, camera tilts upward

agents.ego_description: climbing an outdoor metal staircase between buildings, transitioning to upper level walkways

entered.detail: industrial metal staircase with open grating steps and railings
large satellite dish mounted on the building facade
metal railings of the upper level walkway with potted plants

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the industrial metal staircase, leaving the street level behind. The camera tilts upward to reveal upper building facades with satellite dishes and illuminated windows. The environment transitions to elevated walkways with metal railings, offering a different perspective of the dense urban architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, neon-lit commercial thoroughfare into the gritty depths of a narrow alleyway before ascending to the city's upper levels. It begins on a wet street passing a massive building covered in colorful grid lights and holographic advertisements, moving past construction barriers and pedestrians in a hazy atmosphere. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into an intimate market-like street lined with red paper lanterns and building overhangs, eventually deepening into a green-lit alleyway where steam rises from a food stall. The camera then navigates past a large NiCola advertisement and a burning barrel by a green dumpster before turning toward an industrial metal staircase. Finally, the character ascends the stairs, leaving the street level behind as the camera tilts upward to reveal elevated walkways, satellite dishes, and the dense architecture of the upper city.
